name: Pizza Snacks
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Dried oregano or Dried basil
recipeInstructions:
1. Roll bread slices flat and thin with a rolling pin or an empty quart jar.
2. Place on a flat pan 3 inches under the broiler; heat until lightly toasted on one side, then remove from oven.
3. Turn slices over and spread untoasted sides with a layer of cheese sprinkling.
4. Broil until cheese melts and browns slightly.
5. To serve, cut each pizza into quarters.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 STARCH EXCHANGE + 1/2 LEAN MEAT EXCHANGE; CAL: 123; CHO: 16g; PRO: 7g; SOD: 279. For low-sodium diets, substitute tomato paste for catup.
